title: Email a copy of form to submitter (non-board member)
excerpt:
Hi all, hoping you can help out with this! Seems like it should be an easy answer that I’m just missing.

posts.author: LotteMarketing (Charlotte Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, hoping you can help out with this! Seems like it should be an easy answer that I’m just missing.

We have a job request form distributed within the company used by everyone, but only our internal team has access to the Monday board. I’m looking for a way to send a copy of the form to the person who submitted it for their reference. I’ve set up an email column, but can’t seem to find the right automation option to do this.

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: LotteMarketing (Charlotte Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Help no longer needed - I figured this out!

I was thrown off when the automation asked me to select an email, as I thought this would be where the email was sent, but it was actually the sender’s email. Would be helpful if that was clarified on that page to avoid this confusion in future!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
